description_long: This is a modern, two-story house set on a sloped terrain, featuring a flat roof with a central skylight and a prominent angular extension. The structure is primarily white with sections of orange paneling and large glass windows, especially on the front and side facades. The house is elevated on slender supports, creating an open space beneath the main living area. The rear and side elevations are more solid, with smaller, regularly spaced windows and a single black entry door. The main entryway is accentuated by a sloped, white overhang leading to a recessed entrance. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and a blend of open and private spaces.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large glass windows, and angular white and orange facades, elevated on supports over sloped terrain.
description_view_0: Front view showing the elevated structure, open space beneath, and large glass windows with a white and orange facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the angular extension, orange paneling, and the sloped overhang leading to the main entryway.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a more solid wall with small, evenly spaced windows and a single black entry door.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the combination of solid and open elements, the flat roof, and the recessed entryway.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large glass panels and smaller rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with a sloped overhang, minimalistic door, and no visible porch or decorative columns
